description:
The FZK-Haus residential building model is pre-loaded in Bonsai/BlenderBIM. You are moving the model to Detailed Design. Instead of managing manufacturer data on every individual door, you must define a central Door Type in the project library and assign all relevant doors to inherit its properties.

Expected Actions:
1. Open the project library / type manager in Bonsai.
2. Create a new `IfcDoorType` element in the project.
3. Name the newly created door type `SD-01`.
4. Add the standard `Pset_ManufacturerTypeInformation` property set to the TYPE itself (not the door instances).
5. Within that property set on the type, set the `Manufacturer` property to `Acme Doors`.
6. Select all 5 existing `IfcDoor` instances in the 3D model and assign them to the `SD-01` type (establishing the IfcRelDefinesByType relationship).
7. Save the modified IFC project to `/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_typed_doors.ifc`.

metadata.pass_score_note: Threshold is 65. Saving + creating type + partial assignment is required to pass.
